idea_dna.problem: Engine-free certification of untrusted agent edits to opaque-semantics artifacts (spreadsheets, dbt projects)
idea_dna.assumption: The artifact's own structure (reference-dependency graph) plus its embedded cached values (self-oracle) carry enough redundancy to decide structural-edit faithfulness without running the engine
idea_dna.novelty_claim: Machine-checked bracket of the engine-free certifiable boundary (executable proven-sound decision procedure for the relabeling class + impossibility theorem for unwitnessed semantics), realized as a certify-or-refuse guard with measured saves on live agents

parked_candidates.idea: reused-witnessed-skeleton middle ground (copy-paste edits): decidability of value-forcing from observed data
verified byte->token parse (Kani/Creusot or Lean extraction) to close the last trusted-base gap
per-file adaptive k for the probabilistic tier (quote k from the target file's own collision rate)

tried_and_failed.approach: live-agent 3-way as a guard-SOUNDNESS experiment (agent-correct label = certify verdict on file grafted onto xlq output)
tried_and_failed.why: circular by design; salvaged as differential testing of the trusted tokenizer (found real bugs)

tried_and_failed.approach: LibreOffice cached-value divergence as a corruption-attribution oracle on no-reference formulas (ACCRINT class)
tried_and_failed.why: engine-vs-cache disagreement mislabels 2/172 files as corruption; corrected headline 86.6%->85.5%; attribute only via reference-bearing cells

learnings: Claim-inflation at boundaries is this project's dominant failure class: audit quantifiers (exactly/all/entire/characterize) against what is proven, and put corpus qualifiers on every empirical rate; counts+CI, not rates, at small n

Normalization/tokenizer proxy bugs recur in EVERY new domain adapter (BIN2DEC/LOG10/out-of-grid in xlsx; double-quoted identifiers in SQL) — adversarially probe conflation with executable counterexamples before trusting any adapter
Subagent 'done + verified' claims require independent re-verification: re-run their checks, compute the expected answer yourself, and attack what they did not think to claim
Value-comparison oracles carry label noise (engine recomputes some functions differently from the Excel cache) — a file with no reference-bearing formulas cannot be corrupted by a failed shift
Working-tree drift: paper numbers must match git-show-HEAD artifacts; check benchmarks/*.json against HEAD before citing

best_state.metric: test-tier: 0 false certs/503, 0 shift errors/283960 cells, defect found+fixed
